heading: Reciprocal information sharing
label: 484a Reciprocal information sharing
text: Acting in accordance with a bilateral or multilateral arrangement, the Secretary, in the Secretary’s discretion and on the basis of reciprocity, may provide information from the National Sex Offender Registry relating to a conviction for a sex offense against a minor (as such terms are defined in ) to a foreign government upon the request of the foreign government, and may receive comparable information from the foreign government.section 20911 of title 34
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior amended Rule 6 of the Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure, set out in the Appendix to Title 18, Crimes and Criminal Procedure, prior to repeal by , , .section 895 of Pub. L. 107–296Pub. L. 117–347, title III, § 323(a)(1)(A)136 Stat. 6206Jan. 5, 2023
